default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting purpose

[Discuss SEO strategies and content creation services for Checkly with Marcel Santilli from fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers an AI-augmented content creation process with human expertise, producing high-quality technical content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Pricing is transparent: $9,000/month for \~100,000 words, with a 3-month minimum commitment](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Hannes is hiring a new Head of Marketing and will revisit this opportunity in September](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [The approach involves analyzing competitors' successful content and creating improved versions](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)

## Topics

### Company and Competitor Overview

  - [Checkly: SaaS tool for engineers to monitor service uptime](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [1,000 paying customers, 60 enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [Growing rapidly, raised Series B funding](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Main competitor: Better Stack](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [Creating successful marketing campaigns and ranking well in search results](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Creation Approach

  - [AI-augmented process with human expertise in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Workflow includes:](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [Research using multiple sources (Perplexity, Google, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Custom content generation based on scraped citations](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
      - [Outline creation and review](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Base article generation](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
      - [Adaptation to match client's voice and style](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Cross-linking and CTA integration](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Final human review and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

### Content Strategy and Results

  - [Analyze competitor keywords and create improved versions of high-ranking content](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Example: D-Graph saw significant traffic increase in a short period](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Potential to create 50-100 articles on topics like Playwright framework](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Model

  - [$9,000/month for \~100,000 words (10 cents per word)](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [3-month minimum commitment](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Aim to start publishing within 2 weeks of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Goal: 10-12 articles per week after full ramp-up](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send SOW and invite Hannes to a Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Follow up in the second week of September after Hannes returns from vacation](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Reconnect once the new Head of Marketing is onboarded](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Potential in-person meeting in the Bay Area in September](https://fathom.video/share/TGkNhtZohucR4ojQ4p_7PSzCh5sgbtpe?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)

action_items.description: Adapt content workflows to focus on Playwright framework as initial topic
Follow up with Hannes in early September after he returns from vacation to reconnect, discuss next steps, and block off a follow up date
